name: sci-validate
description: Iterate the research manuscript until structure, citations, and claim substantiation are all green.
fixPrompt: Fix the deliverable at {{deliverable.path}} so each failing check passes. required-sections: add the missing section and write its real content. citation-integrity: define any cited-but-undefined reference, and either cite or remove any defined-but-unused reference. claim-substantiation: for any percentage or superlative claim without a source, add the citation that supports it or soften the claim to what the evidence shows. Edit only the manuscript file.
guardrails: Never invent or fabricate a reference to satisfy citation-integrity — if a claim has no source, the claim must change or be removed, not the citation faked.
Never delete or weaken a result to make a claim substantiate; add the real source or scope the claim to the evidence.
Never delete a required section to pass the structure check — write the section.
onExhausted: Stop. Report which checks still fail and why the manuscript cannot yet be substantiated (e.g., a claim genuinely lacks a source). Recommend human review.
